free.notes: Clean account, no domains or cookies added. Password changed 2026-07-20 during /grill-section Forgot Password — real end-to-end reset flow test (was Rahul123@).

generaltest.notes: Active paid subscription, use for scanning and pageview, consent log cases checking like a regular user who have an active banner running on site

adminuser.notes: Admin user who have admin access to an organisation with paid basic plan website

editoruser.notes: Editor user who have editor access to an organisation with paid basic plan website. CAUTION (2026-07-10): using this account as the recipient/new-owner in an account-ownership-transfer test silently upgrades its role to Admin -- the app's documented 'previous owner retains Admin access' behavior applies to this account too if it later transfers ownership away again. Verify via Team page (or GET /api/v2/user -> organization_users[].role_slug) before trusting it as a true Editor for permission tests; role was corrected back to 'editor' via Team > Change role on 2026-07-10.

disposableuser.plan: This account will have multiple webistes with different plans
disposableuser.notes: Disposable user account who will be used to test the website with different plans. This account can be mutated to have different plans and websites.

multiplewebsitesuser.plan: This account will have multiple webistes with pagination on organisation and sites page also suspended sites will be shown in the sites page
multiplewebsitesuser.notes: Multiple websites user account who will be used to test the website with pagination on organisation and sites page also suspended sites will be shown in the sites page
